Items.Title: зј–з Ғпјҡе°ҶжӮЁзҡ„жғіжі•еҸҳдёәзҺ°е®һзҡ„иүәжңҜ | Coding: The Art of Bringing Your Ideas to Life
Items.Description:
жӮЁжңүжІЎжңүжғіиҝҮзҪ‘з«ҷгҖҒз§»еҠЁеә”з”ЁзЁӢеәҸе’ҢиҪҜд»¶жҳҜеҰӮдҪ•еҲӣе»әзҡ„пјҹ зӯ”жЎҲжҳҜзј–з ҒгҖӮ зј–з ҒжҳҜдёәи®Ўз®—жңәзј–еҶҷжҢҮд»Өд»ҘзҗҶи§Је’Ңжү§иЎҢзү№е®ҡд»»еҠЎзҡ„иҝҮзЁӢгҖӮ

йҡҸзқҖжҠҖжңҜзҡ„дёҚж–ӯиҝӣжӯҘпјҢеҜ№зҶҹз»ғзј–з Ғдәәе‘ҳзҡ„йңҖжұӮжӯЈеңЁдёҠеҚҮгҖӮ зј–з ҒдёҚеҶҚеҸӘжҳҜи®Ўз®—жңәз§‘еӯҰе®¶е’Ңе·ҘзЁӢеёҲзҡ„е·Ҙе…·пјҢиҖҢжҳҜеҗ„иЎҢеҗ„дёҡзҡ„дәәзҡ„е®қиҙөжҠҖиғҪгҖӮ д»ҺйҮ‘иһҚеҲ°еҢ»з–—дҝқеҒҘпјҢзј–з ҒжӯЈеңЁж”№еҸҳжҲ‘д»¬зҡ„з”ҹжҙ»е’Ңе·ҘдҪңж–№ејҸгҖӮ

йӮЈд№ҲпјҢжҳҜд»Җд№Ҳи®©зј–з ҒжҲҗдёәдёҖйЎ№еҰӮжӯӨе®қиҙөзҡ„жҠҖиғҪе‘ўпјҹ еҜ№дәҺеҲқеӯҰиҖ…пјҢе®ғж•ҷжҺҲи§ЈеҶій—®йўҳзҡ„жҠҖе·§гҖӮ еңЁзј–з Ғж—¶пјҢжӮЁеҝ…йЎ»йҖ»иҫ‘е’Ңзі»з»ҹең°жҖқиҖғпјҢд»ҘжүҫеҲ°и§ЈеҶіеӨҚжқӮй—®йўҳзҡ„ж–№жі•гҖӮ иҝҷз§ҚжҠҖиғҪдёҚд»…еңЁжҠҖжңҜзҺҜеўғдёӯеҫҲжңүд»·еҖјпјҢеңЁж—Ҙеёёз”ҹжҙ»дёӯд№ҹеҫҲжңүд»·еҖјгҖӮ

зј–з Ғзҡ„еҸҰдёҖдёӘеҘҪеӨ„жҳҜиғҪеӨҹе°ҶжӮЁзҡ„жғіжі•еҸҳдёәзҺ°е®һгҖӮ ж— и®әжӮЁжҳҜжғідёәиҮӘе·ұзҡ„дјҒдёҡеҲӣе»әзҪ‘з«ҷгҖҒжһ„е»әз§»еҠЁеә”з”ЁзЁӢеәҸиҝҳжҳҜи®ҫи®ЎиҪҜд»¶пјҢзј–з ҒйғҪжҳҜе®һзҺ°иҝҷдёҖзӣ®ж Үзҡ„е…ій”®гҖӮ йҖҡиҝҮзј–з ҒпјҢеӨ©з©әжҳҜжһҒйҷҗгҖӮ

еҰӮжһңжӮЁжңүе…ҙи¶ЈеӯҰд№ зј–з ҒпјҢеҸҜд»ҘдҪҝз”ЁеӨ§йҮҸиө„жәҗгҖӮ еңЁзәҝиҜҫзЁӢгҖҒж•ҷзЁӢе’Ңи®әеқӣжҳҜдёҖдёӘеҫҲеҘҪзҡ„иө·зӮ№гҖӮ е®һи·өжҳҜжҲҗдёәдёҖеҗҚжҲҗеҠҹзј–з Ғе‘ҳзҡ„е…ій”®пјҢжүҖд»ҘдёҚиҰҒе®іжҖ•жҠ•е…Ҙе№¶ејҖе§Ӣеҹ№е…»дҪ зҡ„жҠҖиғҪгҖӮ

зј–з ҒеҸҜиғҪе…·жңүжҢ‘жҲҳжҖ§пјҢдҪҶе®ғд№ҹйқһеёёжңүзӣҠгҖӮ йҡҸзқҖжӮЁзҡ„иҝӣжӯҘпјҢжӮЁдјҡеҸ‘зҺ°иҮӘе·ұеҜ№иҮӘе·ұзҡ„иғҪеҠӣжӣҙжңүдҝЎеҝғпјҢе№¶дёәиҮӘе·ұжһ„е»әзҡ„йЎ№зӣ®ж„ҹеҲ°иҮӘиұӘгҖӮ

йӮЈд№Ҳдёәд»Җд№ҲдёҚе°қиҜ•зј–з Ғе‘ўпјҹ ж— и®әжӮЁжҳҜеңЁеҜ»жүҫдёҖд»Ҫж–°зҡ„иҒҢдёҡгҖҒдёҖз§ҚзҲұеҘҪпјҢиҝҳжҳҜеҸӘжҳҜдёҖз§Қе°ҶжӮЁзҡ„жғіжі•еҸҳдёәзҺ°е®һзҡ„ж–№ејҸпјҢзј–з ҒйғҪжҳҜдёҖдёӘе®ҢзҫҺзҡ„иө·зӮ№гҖӮ еҮҶеӨҮеҘҪејҖе§ӢдёҖж®өе……ж»ЎеҲӣйҖ еҠӣгҖҒи§ЈеҶій—®йўҳе’Ңж— йҷҗеҸҜиғҪзҡ„ж—…зЁӢгҖӮ



еҺҹж–Ү:

Have you ever wondered how websites, mobile apps, and software are created? The answer is coding. Coding is the process of writing instructions for computers to understand and carry out specific tasks.

As technology continues to advance, the demand for skilled coders is on the rise. Coding is no longer just a tool for computer scientists and engineers, but a valuable skill for people in a variety of industries. From finance to healthcare, coding is changing the way we live and work.

So what is it that makes coding such a valuable skill? For starters, it teaches problem-solving skills. When coding, you must think logically and systematically to find solutions to complex problems. This skill is not only valuable in a technical setting, but in everyday life as well.

Another benefit of coding is the ability to bring your ideas to life. Whether you want to create a website for your business, build a mobile app, or design software, coding is the key to making it happen. With coding, the sky's the limit.

If you're interested in learning to code, there are plenty of resources available. Online courses, tutorials, and forums are a great place to start. Practice is key to becoming a successful coder, so don't be afraid to dive in and start building your skills.

Coding can be challenging, but it's also incredibly rewarding. As you progress, you'll find yourself feeling more confident in your abilities and proud of the projects you've built.

So why not give coding a try? Whether you're looking for a new career, a hobby, or just a way to bring your ideas to life, coding is the perfect place to start. Get ready to embark on a journey of creativity, problem-solving, and endless possibilities.
Items.Author: mirazdev

Items.Title: зҪ‘з«ҷз¬¬дёҖеӨ© | Website Day 1
Items.Description:
йҳҝиҙқе°”йҘ¶

еҸ‘иЎЁдәҺ 2 жңҲ 4 ж—Ҙ

жүҖд»ҘжҳЁеӨ©жҲ‘жҺҘеҸ—дәҶжҢ‘жҲҳпјҢејҖе§ӢеңЁжҲ‘иҮӘе·ұзҡ„дёӘдәәжҠ•иө„з»„еҗҲзҪ‘з«ҷдёҠзңҹжӯЈејҖе§ӢгҖӮ жҲ‘ејҖе§Ӣи®ҫи®Ўе№¶еҶіе®ҡеңЁжүҖжңүз№ҒйҮҚзҡ„е·ҘдҪңе®ҢжҲҗеҗҺж·»еҠ еҶ…е®№гҖӮ жүҖд»ҘжҲ‘еҺ» Dribble еҜ»жүҫдёҖдәӣи®ҫи®Ўдё»йўҳгҖӮ жҲ‘жңҖз»ҲзЎ®е®ҡзҡ„жҳҜж–°йҮҺиӣ®дё»д№үгҖӮ жҲ‘еңЁи®ҫи®Ўж–№йқўйқһеёёж— з”ЁпјҢе№¶дё”зҹҘйҒ“зҡ„и¶ід»Ҙи®©е®ғйҖҡиҝҮгҖӮ дҪҶжҳҜиҝҷж¬ЎжҲ‘жғіи®©зҪ‘з«ҷзңӢиө·жқҘе®һйҷ…дёҠиҝҳдёҚй”ҷгҖӮ ж–°йҮҺиӣ®дё»д№үйҒөеҫӘжЈұи§’еҲҶжҳҺгҖҒиүІеҪ©йІңиүігҖҒз¬”и§ҰеӨ§иғҶзҡ„и®ҫи®ЎпјҢиҝҷдёҺжҲ‘д»¬д»ҠеӨ©еңЁзҺ°д»ЈзҪ‘з«ҷдёҠзңӢеҲ°зҡ„жҲӘз„¶дёҚеҗҢгҖӮ з„¶еҗҺжҲ‘еҸ‘зҺ°дәҶдёҖдёӘеҗҚдёә dodonut.com зҡ„зҪ‘з«ҷпјҢжҲ‘йқһеёёе–ңж¬ўе®ғзҡ„и°ғиүІжқҝпјҢжүҖд»ҘжҲ‘жӢҝеҮәдәҶжңҖеёёз”Ёзҡ„йўңиүІе№¶ејҖе§Ӣе·ҘдҪңгҖӮ жҲ‘ж·»еҠ дәҶдёҖдёӘж ҮйўҳгҖҒдёҖдёӘеҹәжң¬д»Ӣз»ҚгҖҒжҲ‘зҡ„зӨҫдәӨе’ҢдёҖдёӘе…ідәҺйғЁеҲҶпјҢжүҖжңүиҝҷдәӣйғҪйҒөеҫӘзӣёеҗҢзҡ„жЁЎејҸгҖӮ з„¶еҗҺжҲ‘ж„ҸиҜҶеҲ°еңЁж ҮйўҳдёҠжңүдёҖдёӘж»ҡеҠЁиҝӣеәҰдјҡеҫҲеҘҪжүҖд»ҘжҲ‘жҹҘжүҫдәҶдёҖдәӣд»Јз ҒжқҘеҒҡеҲ°иҝҷдёҖзӮ№е№¶е°Ҷе…¶ж”ҫе…ҘгҖӮ

 const [completion, setCompletion] = useState(0) useEffect(() => { const updateScroll = () => { const progress = window.scrollY const scrollHeight = document.body.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight if (scrollHeight){ setCompletion( Number((progress / scrollHeight).toFixed(2)) * 100 ) } } window.addEventListener('scroll', updateScroll) return () => window.removeEventListener('scroll', updateScroll) }, []) return completion

иҝҷдёӘе®ҢжҲҗеҸҳйҮҸжҳҜдёҖдёӘд»ӢдәҺ 0 е’Ң 100 д№Ӣй—ҙзҡ„еҖјпјҢе…·дҪ“еҸ–еҶідәҺжӮЁеңЁйЎөйқўдёҠзҡ„дҪҚзҪ®пјҢзҺ°еңЁе°ҶдёҖдёӘиҪ¬жҚўеұһжҖ§ж”ҫеңЁдёҖдёӘз©әзҡ„ div дёҠеҸҜд»ҘеўһеҠ дёҖдёӘеҫҲеҘҪзҡ„ж•ҲжһңжқҘжҳҫзӨәж»ҡеҠЁиҝӣеәҰгҖӮ

 <div style={{ transform: `scaleX(${completion / 100})` }} className={styles.progress} />

з„¶еҗҺжҲ‘е°Ҷиҝҷдәӣжӣҙж”№жҺЁйҖҒеҲ° GitHub еӯҳеӮЁеә“пјҢе°Ҫз®ЎжӮЁзңӢдёҚеҲ°еӨҡе°‘пјҢдҪҶиҝҷиҠұиҙ№дәҶеӨ§йҮҸж—¶й—ҙгҖӮ

дәәд»¬зј–з Ғзҡ„еҺҹеӣ д»Қз„¶жҳҜдёӘи°ңгҖӮ и®©иҮӘе·ұз»ҸеҺҶеҰӮжӯӨеӨҡзҡ„з—ӣиӢҰпјҢеҚҙеҸӘеҸ–еҫ—иҝҷд№Ҳе°‘зҡ„жҲҗе°ұпјҢиҝҷиҝқиғҢдәҶдәәзұ»зҡ„зӣҙи§үгҖӮ з„¶иҖҢпјҢжҲ‘д»¬дёӯзҡ„и®ёеӨҡдәәжҜҸеӨ©йғҪиҝҷж ·еҒҡпјҢе№¶д»Һдёӯж”¶иҺ·еҝ«д№җгҖӮ дәәзұ»зңҹжҳҜдёҖдёӘеҘҮжҖӘзҡ„з§Қж—ҸвҖ”вҖ”йҳҝиҙқе°”В·жӢүеҘҘ2023

зҺ°еңЁиҪ®еҲ°дҪ дәҶпјҒ еҲӣе»әдёҖдёӘеёҗжҲ·пјҢеҠ е…Ҙж•°еҚҒдёҮ DEV жҲҗе‘ҳзҡ„ж—…зЁӢгҖӮ

дёҖж—ҰжҡӮеҒңпјҢabeerrao е°Ҷж— жі•еҸ‘иЎЁиҜ„и®әжҲ–еҸ‘еёғеё–еӯҗпјҢзӣҙеҲ°д»–д»¬зҡ„жҡӮеҒңиў«и§ЈйҷӨгҖӮ

и§ЈйҷӨжҡӮеҒңеҗҺпјҢabeerrao е°ҶиғҪеӨҹеҶҚж¬ЎеҸ‘иЎЁиҜ„и®әе’ҢеҸ‘еёғеё–еӯҗгҖӮ

дёҖж—ҰеҸ–ж¶ҲеҸ‘еёғпјҢaberrao зҡ„жүҖжңүеё–еӯҗйғҪе°Ҷйҡҗи—Ҹиө·жқҘпјҢеҸӘжңүд»–д»¬иҮӘе·ұеҸҜд»Ҙи®ҝй—®гҖӮ

еҰӮжһң abeerrao жІЎжңүиў«жҡӮеҒңпјҢд»–д»¬д»Қз„¶еҸҜд»Ҙд»Һд»–д»¬зҡ„д»ӘиЎЁжқҝйҮҚж–°еҸ‘еёғд»–д»¬зҡ„её–еӯҗгҖӮ

з¬”и®°пјҡ

ж„ҹи°ўжӮЁдҝқжҠӨ DEV зӨҫеҢә рҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ’»рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’» зҡ„е®үе…ЁгҖӮ жӮЁеҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮд»ҘдёӢж–№ејҸж Үи®° abeerraoпјҡ

йҷҚдҪҺ abeerrao еҸ‘еёғзҡ„жүҖжңүеё–еӯҗзҡ„еҸҜи§ҒеәҰ

жҠҘе‘Ҡе…¶д»–дёҚеҪ“иЎҢдёә

еҸ–ж¶Ҳж Үи®° abeerrao е°ҶжҒўеӨҚе…¶её–еӯҗзҡ„й»ҳи®ӨеҸҜи§ҒжҖ§гҖӮ



еҺҹж–Ү:

Abeer Rao

Posted on Feb 4

So yesterday I took on the challenge to actually get started on my own personal portfolio website. I got started with the design and decided that I will add the content later on when all the heavy lifting has been done. So I went to Dribble to look for some design themes. And the one I finalised is Neobrutalism. I am very trashy at design and know just about enough for it to pass. But this time I wanted to make the website look actually half decent. Neobrutalism follows the design of having sharp edges, bright colours, and bold strokes, which is quite different from what we see on modern websites today. I then came across a website called dodonut.com whose colour palette I really liked, so I took out the most used colours and got to work. I added a header, a basic introduction, my socials, and an about section all following the same pattern. I then realised that having a scroll progress on the header would be good so I looked up some code to do it and put it in.

const [completion, setCompletion] = useState(0)

    useEffect(() => {
        const updateScroll = () => {
            const progress = window.scrollY
            const scrollHeight = document.body.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight
            if (scrollHeight){
                setCompletion(
                    Number((progress / scrollHeight).toFixed(2)) * 100
                )
            }
        }
        window.addEventListener('scroll', updateScroll)
        return () => window.removeEventListener('scroll', updateScroll)
    }, [])

    return completion

This completion variable is a value between 0 and 100 depending on where you are on the page, now putting a transform property on an empty div adds a nice effect to show scroll progress.

<div
    style={{ transform: `scaleX(${completion / 100})` }}
    className={styles.progress} />

I then pushed these changes to the GitHub repo and despite how little you can see, this took a substantial amount of time.

The reason people code is still a mystery. To put oneself through so much pain to achieve so little goes against human intuitiveness. Yet so many of us do it on a daily basis and reap happiness out of it. Humans are truly a weird race - Abeer Rao 2023

Now it's your turn!В рҹ—’ Share a tutorialрҹӨ” Reflect on your coding journey
